location.description: Old York Road between Somerville and Tabor, just East of Broad

comments: There used to be a circular relief portrait, which is now missing
inscription:
IN MEMORY OF
GEORGE McKENSIE POINSETT,
BORN OCTOBER 10, 1894
KILLED IN ACTION AT
VERA CRUZ, MEXICO
APRIL 21, 1914
ERECTED BY
THE LOGAN
IMPROVEMENT LEAGUE
MXMXV

landmark.name: Jefferson Einstein Philadelphia Hospital
landmark.prefix: North end of Clarkson Park, West side of Old York, South of Albert Einstein Drive,
